40.35mm. 0.7mm. FKM. No drilling.

Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact case—40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and 22mm lug width. FKM rubber ensures a secure, scratch-free fit without drilling or glue.

ideas.why_this_wins: Directly leverages the proven spec-driven hook pattern (40.35mm / 0.7mm / FKM) that scored 9/10 engagement in past posts. Aligns with the top trend cluster (Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race) and addresses the primary audience tension: exact fit without damage.
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Overused spec language without fresh visual execution. Macro shots must be razor-sharp to convey precision.

ideas.why_this_wins: Contrast format is highly shareable and taps into FOMO (generic straps vs. engineered solution). Aligns with the trend cluster “Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race” and addresses the objection: “Why pay more for an adapter?”
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Generic strap must be visibly inferior (gap, slip) to make the contrast effective. Avoid overused “before/after” tropes.

ideas.why_this_wins: Unboxing format builds trust and authority, especially for collectors and design-led buyers. Proof-driven hooks (specs + fit demonstration) reinforce the brand’s engineering-led positioning.
ideas.what_could_kill_it: Unboxing must feel premium and intentional. Avoid generic “here’s the product” shots—focus on the fit demonstration.

execution_note_for_operator: REEL_1 is the operators_best_bet due to its alignment with the proven spec-driven hook pattern (40.35mm / 0.7mm / FKM) and the top trend cluster (Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race). Prioritize macro shots for precision and ensure the 0.7mm retaining lip is sharply in focus. All ideas are production-ready with existing assets (colourway samples, Royal Pop case).
